name: Polytomic Data Sync API
what_it_does: Bidirectional data sync platform with REST API — syncing data between databases, warehouses, and SaaS tools in both directions (forward ETL, reverse ETL, and bidirectional) with a no-code interface and API for embedding sync workflows in products.
use_cases: Bidirectional sync between Salesforce and PostgreSQL without custom pipeline code
Embedding data sync capabilities in a SaaS product via Polytomic's API and embedded UI
Syncing warehouse data to operational tools (HubSpot, Zendesk) on a schedule or trigger
Triggering sync runs programmatically via API after dbt model completion
White-labeling data sync for customers via Polytomic's embedded integration platform
not_for: Large-scale data transformation (use dbt or Spark for heavy compute)
Real-time event streaming (use Kafka or Flink)
Teams needing fully self-hosted data sync without SaaS dependency
best_when: A product team needs bidirectional data sync between databases and SaaS tools, or wants to embed data sync as a feature in their own product for customers.
avoid_when: You only need one-way warehouse-to-tool sync (Census or Hightouch may be simpler), or need pure streaming.

auth.notes: API keys from workspace settings. Organization-scoped access. Read and write scope separation. OAuth2 used for source/destination connections (not the Polytomic API itself). Embedded partner tokens for white-label integrations.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $500/month; Growth and Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: No free tier — commercial product. Differentiated by bidirectional sync and embedded integration use case. US-based. Strong focus on embedded iPaaS for B2B SaaS products. Partner program for embedded integration resellers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan and sync frequency

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for managing syncs, connections, and triggering runs. Webhook support for sync events. OpenAPI spec available. Embedded UI components for white-label use. Sync runs are async — poll for status.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Sync triggers create new run — not idempotent. Sync config updates idempotent. Connection creation idempotent for same name. Run status queries always idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Bidirectional sync requires careful conflict resolution configuration — defaults may not be correct
Sync runs async — webhook recommended over polling for agent workflows
Embedded mode requires separate partner program enrollment
Source/destination API rate limits constrain maximum sync frequency

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 Type II certified. GDPR compliant. API keys with read/write scopes. Connection credentials encrypted at rest. US data residency. No long-term data storage — data passes through sync engine only.
